meaning: n.镇定不乱的人,不苟言笑的人
examples: Mr Portman seems unembarrassed about coming over as a sobersides with a head for numbers.
Another spendthrift, Viktor Gerashchenko, the central-bank chief, has also become something of a sobersides.
L. Mencken had a field day portraying the self-righteous sobersides of the prairies (who often drank homemade corn liquor behind the barn at night).
